message:
test(distributed): add security test for token-rejection in distributed listener

New integration test: distributed_listener_rejects_invalid_token_and_does_not_persist_remote_panes

Validates that the distributed listener correctly:
1. Rejects connections with invalid auth tokens
2. Returns a structured error response (ok=false, code="dist.auth_failed")
3. Does NOT persist any remote pane metadata for rejected sessions

This is a security-critical path — ensuring that unauthenticated agents
cannot inject pane state into the local storage via the distributed protocol.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
